chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-2507 of 2021 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.10782/2021 3. For hearing of Main Case 30.08.2022 Ms. D il Khurram Shaheen, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. S. Shafqat Ali Shah Masoomi, Advocate for the Respondent. Mr. G. M. Bhutto, Assistant Attorney General. ----------------- Counsel for the petitioner states that she will avail the legal remedy as provided to the petitioner under the law and does not press this petition. Petition stands disposed of alongwith the listed application. JUDGE JUDGE SM
